'''narogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackleberry|crackleberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackleberry|crackleberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| narogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næregeth|næregeth]] || [[word:næregej|næregej]] || [[word:næregesh|næregesh]] || [[word:nærege|nærege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:narorogoth|narorogoth]] || [[word:narorogoj|narorogoj]] || [[word:narorogosh|narorogosh]] || [[word:narorogo|narorogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:narogoth|narogoth]] || [[word:narogoj|narogoj]] || [[word:narogosh|narogosh]] || [[word:narogo|narogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:narofgoth|narofgoth]] || [[word:narofgoj|narofgoj]] || [[word:narofgosh|narofgosh]] || [[word:narofgof|narofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:narogotho|narogotho]] || [[word:narogojo|narogojo]] || [[word:narogosho|narogosho]] || [[word:narogoko|narogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:narogoth|narogoth]] || [[word:narogoj|narogoj]] || [[word:narogosh|narogosh]] || [[word:narogo|narogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:narogothol|narogothol]] || [[word:narogojol|narogojol]] || [[word:narogoshol|narogoshol]] || [[word:narogokol|narogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:narogothotho|narogothotho]] || [[word:narogojojo|narogojojo]] || [[word:narogoshosho|narogoshosho]] || [[word:narogoko|narogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:narogothon|narogothon]] || [[word:narogojon|narogojon]] || [[word:narogoshon|narogoshon]] || [[word:narogokon|narogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:narogothoro|narogothoro]] || [[word:narogojoro|narogojoro]] || [[word:narogoshoro|narogoshoro]] || [[word:narogokoro|narogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
